caption:
Namaste Sparsh Hair Skin Dermatology Clinic 👋

Thank you for confirming.

I’m sharing a short demo built specifically around a *skin, hair and dermatology clinic enquiry workflow*.

In most clinics, valuable patient enquiries come from many places at once — WhatsApp, missed calls, website forms, Instagram, repeat patients and staff callbacks. The challenge is not getting enquiries. The real challenge is making sure every enquiry is followed up on time.

This demo shows how Sparsh Clinic can get a simple, owner-visible follow-up board where every enquiry has:

✅ Clear status
✅ Assigned follow-up owner
✅ Next action date
✅ Callback visibility
✅ Daily owner summary
✅ No patient medical data required for the first setup

The goal is practical: fewer missed enquiries, cleaner staff handover, faster appointment follow-up and better visibility for the clinic owner.

This is not a heavy CRM or complicated software project. It is a lightweight clinic growth system that can start small and become more automated as your process grows.

Please see the demo video attached.

If this looks useful, we can do a quick 10–15 minute walkthrough for Sparsh Clinic and show exactly how this can fit your current WhatsApp and follow-up process.

Would today evening or tomorrow be convenient for a short walkthrough?

— Anushka Bhattacharya
Director, AICloudStrategist
